name: Univacco Technology Inc.
summary: Univacco Technology Inc. manufactures and sells stamping foil products and optoelectronics materials worldwide. The company offers various decorative and functional foils, which include hot stamping, cold, holographic, and digital foils. The company also provides optoelectronics materials, including clean and PET protective films, diffuser, SMD cover tapes, medical films, and OEM for coating. The company provides its products for wine, beer, and spirits label and packaging; food, drink, and confectionery packaging; tobacco/cigarette packaging; greeting cards and printed media; artificial leather book covers; persona care; cosmetics and perfumes; pharmaceuticals; and clothing and textile applications. It markets its products under the UNIVACCO brand. The company was formerly known as Tai Leng Industry Co., Ltd and changed its name to Univacco Technology Inc. in 2002. Univacco Technology Inc. was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in Tainan City, Taiwan.
